programmes.show_description: Bal-T is on the decks for this week's Love Friday Mix! Featuring the biggest R'n'B, hip-hop, Pakistani, Bhangra and Bollywood tracks.
Punjabi Hit Squad are on the decks for this week's Love Friday Mix, and it's a Bollywood special! Featuring the biggest hip-hop, Pakistani, Bhangra and Bollywood tracks.
MR.O jumps on the decks to bring the energy to Friday nights!
Labour MP Naz Shah on her family's experience of abuse and 'izzat'. Plus an insight into Nina Sparks, Britain's first female Paralympic snowboarder. Deals with adult themes.
Adam Azim and Duaa Karim discuss the highs and lows of their lives in boxing and acting, and how they support each other along the way.
Brand new sounds from the Asian Network with Tegi Pannu, A.R. Rahman and Jazzy B.
It's the ultimate Breakfast presenter showdown with Vallisa vs Smash! Plus get ready for the weekend with the latest Love Friday Mix from Bal-T.
Vallisa spins the biggest certified anthems to make your day wherever you are.
It's Haroon Rashid's Eid Party, and you're all invited! See you in your Eid finest! He also chats to Ashish Chanchlani about his latest series, Ekaki.
The latest news from around the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Bollywood with Haroon Rashid
programmes.show_description: The biggest stars in the Asian film and TV scene drop in for a chat with Haroon, and he puts a movie fan's knowledge to the test in Superfan, the topic: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke.
...Throwbacks with Haroon Rashid. Asian Network Certified Throwback bangers! Big anthems you haven't heard in ages!

programmes.show_name: The Official Asian Music Chart with Gagan Grewal
programmes.show_description: Gagan Grewal runs you through the songs you've been downloading and streaming this week.

programmes.show_description: Music heaven right here with Bollywood, Bhangra, UK Garage, R&B & Hip-Hop all mashed up.
The latest news from around the UK and around the world.
Dee and Rav are stepping into spring with a Club Hit Squad mix just for you. Nothing but those feel-good anthems to kickstart your weekend.
MR.O jumps on the decks to bring the energy to Friday nights!
Prito Litecandy, a British-Tamil producer and DJ is stepping into the Desi Dancefloor Mix and blending the slickest sounds. Expect music from A R Rehman, Nelly and Udit Narayan.
Krithi is stepping into the Desi Dancefloor Mix from Brooklyn, New York and blending the slickest sounds.
Manara drops a three hour show full of dance floor fillers, hidden gems and feel good frequencies. Expect all manner of global and Asian club music. Contains strong language.
Gunni's third week of the Pure Spice Takeover is the soundtrack to your late-night drive! Contains strong language.
Nonstop Asian Network bangers from the likes of Raghav, H33RA and Jasmine Sandlas!

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Vik tells Harleen Nottay how he created his own styling brand Tru Man and a barber shop business from nothing and ensures he gives back to the community that supported him.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Tanya Chaundhry joins Harleen Nottay to discuss her male and female perfume company Khane. The pair discuss the influence of her family and how she's built her brand over time.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Motivation with Sarover Aulja
programmes.show_description: Sarover Aulja brings the motivation, celebrating life's wins big and small - from weddings and graduations to everyday victories - with bhangra nostalgia and South Asian hits.
SMASHBengali kicks your morning into gear with big energy, big laughs and the kind of tunes that wake you up quicker than your first sip of chai and a round of Guess the Gibberish.
SMASHBengali brings 60 minutes of Asian Network Certified. A mix of the biggest sounds from across the scene, blending South Asian hits with a whole load of sing-along energy.
Film Kapoor & Sons turns ten, plus which Eid track will you choose for This or That? Vallisa also celebrates another big Bollywood birthday with Lost in Bollywood.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Certified Throwbacks with Vallisa
programmes.show_description: Asian Network Certified Throwback bangers! Big anthems you haven't heard in ages!
Shankeya sits in. Brown events always do the most! What's the craziest thing you've seen? Plus Pick & Play and the Fast Track Anthem to kick-start your Saturday night.
DJ Kizzi soundtracks your Saturday nights with the biggest and best tunes, Asian anthems and mixes.
Manara's laying out an absolute feast for Eid and you're all invited. Indulge yourself in a delectable array of Asian throwbacks. Contains strong language.
